gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T3.raceId) FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country NOT IN ( 'Bahrain', 'China', 'Singapore', 'Japan', 'Korea', 'Turkey', 'UAE', 'Malaysia', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Azerbaijan', 'Austria', 'Belgium', 'France', 'Germany', 'Hungary', 'Italy', 'UK' ) AND T3.year = 2010
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T3.raceId) 
FROM races AS T3
JOIN circuits AS T2 ON T3.circuitId = T2.circuitId
WHERE T3.year = 2010
AND T2.country NOT IN ('Austria', 'Azerbaijan', 'Belgium', 'France', 'Germany', 'Hungary', 'Italy', 'Monaco', 'Netherlands', 'Portugal', 'Russia', 'Spain', 'Sweden', 'Switzerland', 'Turkey', 'UK', 'Bahrain', 'China', 'India', 'Japan', 'Korea', 'Malaysia', 'Singapore', 'UAE');
question: How many races in the year 2010 are held on grand prixs outside Asia and Europe?
